ddls:
CREATE TABLE "scholars" (
  "scholar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scholar */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the scholar */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the scholar */,
  "citizenship" TEXT /* Citizenship of the scholar */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the scholar */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the scholar */,
  "home_institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home institution of the scholar */,
  "host_institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the host institution for the scholar's program */,
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the discipline the scholar belongs to */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the scholar is enrolled in */,
  "program_country" TEXT /* Country where the program is taking place */,
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year of the program */,
  "program_status" TEXT /* Status of the scholar's program (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scholar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scholars_host_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_institution_id") REFERENCES host_institutions ("host_institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scholars_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scholars_home_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_institution_id") REFERENCES home_institutions ("home_institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scholars_academic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("academic_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scholars_discipline_id FOREIGN KEY ("discipline_id") REFERENCES disciplines ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "home_institutions" (
  "home_institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each home institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("home_institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "host_institutions" (
  "host_institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the institution */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplines" (
  "discipline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discipline */,
  "discipline_name" TEXT /* Name of the discipline (e.g., Education, Engineering) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the discipline */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study within the discipline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discipline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., research, teaching) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_years" (
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the academic program (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("academic_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation record */,
  "scholar_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scholar participating */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program in which the scholar is enrolled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the scholar (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date of participation */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date of completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_scholar_id FOREIGN KEY ("scholar_id") REFERENCES scholars ("scholar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "scholar_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scholar applying */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the application was reviewed */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_applications_scholar_id FOREIGN KEY ("scholar_id") REFERENCES scholars ("scholar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the application being evaluated */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator conducting the evaluation */,
  "score" REAL /* Score assigned to the application */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the application */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES applications ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the evaluator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the evaluator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the evaluator works */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the evaluator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluation related to the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the evaluation */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation based on the evaluation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coordinator, advisor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level of the user for the program (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)
